availability.p: © Duke Databank of Documentary Papyri. This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 License.

revisionDesc.change: Vote - AcceptText - See Krueger's comments + change language to .cop; since a picture of the recto is available, add a second disclaimer "“Where diacritical signs or supralinear strokes above letters are present on the original, these were not recorded in Crum's edition. Since Crum in his later editions did indicate these marks, we have chosen to add them tacitly where access to an image has made this possible.” + lin2=> ⲣⲏⲧ*word-sep-apostrophe* ⲁⲣⲓ; lin3=> <:ⲛⲅⲃ̣.2ⲁⲓ̣|alt|ⲛⲅⲃⲱⲕ ⲛⲁⲓ:> (add alt with a ⲛ at the beginning of ⲛⲅⲃⲱⲕ and a supralinear stroke); ϣⲟⲣⲡ ⲛ (add supralinear strokes); lin4=> ⲙⲡⲛⲟⲩⲧⲉ (add supralinear stroke); ⲧ<:νηστεία=grc|reg|<:ⲛⲏⲥⲧⲓ̣[ⲁ]= PN L. Vanderheyden (photograph)|ed|ⲛⲏⲥⲧ[ⲓⲁ]:>:> (add reg + PN corr); lin5=> ⲙⲡ[ (add supralinear stroke); lin7=> ⲙⲡⲁ[ (add supralinear stroke); lin8=> ⲙⲡⲣⲉ[ (add supralinear stroke); lin9=> <:ϭⲛⲧⲁⲛⲉ.2[.?]= PN L. Vanderheyden (photograph)|ed|ϭⲛⲧⲁⲛⲉ[.?]:>(add supralinear stroke + PN corr); the rest of the text is good to me

Vote - AcceptText - Note that the presentation of the edition of O.Crum here represents a synthesis of Crum's original handwritten edition with his own corrections that he later supplied in the notes to his translations.
lin2=> ⲡ̣ⲉ̣ⲣⲏⲧ; ⲁⲣⲓ ⲧ<:ἀγάπη=grc|reg|ⲁ[ⲅⲁ]3.- ⲡⲏ:> (add space) lin3=> <:ⲛⲅⲃ̣.2ⲁⲓ̣ |alt|ⲅⲃⲱⲕ ⲛⲁⲓ:> (add alt); ⲛϩⲟⲟⲩ [ϩⲙ ⲡ]4.- ⲟⲩⲱϣ (add spaces) lin4=> ⲧ<:νηστεία=grc|reg|ⲛⲏⲥⲧ[ⲓⲁ]:> (add reg) lin5=> ϫⲉ ⲕⲛⲁⲃⲱⲕ (add space); ⲙⲡ[ϣⲟⲣⲡ ⲛ(?)] lin6=> 6.- ϩⲟⲟⲩ (add hyphen); <:ⲛϩⲱ.1 ⲉϣⲟ7. ⲡⲉ ⲕⲛⲏⲩ=PN F. Krueger (common phraseology)|ed|ⲛϩⲱ.3ⲟ7. ⲡⲉⲕⲛⲏⲩ︥:> lin7=> <:ⲙⲡⲁ[ⲧⲉ<ⲧⲉ>]<:νηστεία=grc|reg|[ⲛ]ⲏ̣ⲥ8.- ⲧⲓⲁ:>=PN F. Krueger (emendation)|ed|ⲙⲡⲁ[ⲧⲉⲛ]ⲏ̣ⲥ8.- ⲧⲓⲁ:> lin12=> ⲡϫⲟⲉⲓⲥ (correct last letter)
Submit - Entered text according to O.Crum 101. Hope I got the Greek loan words right. Not sure whether my attempt at lin11 interprets Crum correctly.

div.p: Where diacritical signs or supralinear strokes above letters are present on the original, these were not recorded in Crum's edition. Since Crum in his later editions did indicate these marks, we have chosen to add them tacitly where access to an image has made this possible. Note that the presentation of the edition of O.Crum here represents a synthesis of Crum's original handwritten edition with his own corrections that he later supplied in the notes to his translations.

div.ab:
ⲡἐλάχιστοςⲉⲗⲁⲭⲓⲥⲧⲟⲥ ϩⲏⲗⲓⲁⲥ ⲉϥⲥϩⲁⲓ ⲙ
ⲡⲉϥⲙⲉⲣⲓⲧ ⲛⲥⲟⲛⲡⲉⲣⲏⲧ ⲁⲣⲓ ⲧἀγάπηⲁⲅⲁ
ⲡⲏ ⲛⲅⲃⲁⲓⲛⲅⲃⲱⲕ ⲛⲁⲓ ⲙⲡϣⲟⲣⲡ ⲛϩⲟⲟⲩ ϩⲙ ⲡ
ⲟⲩⲱϣ ⲙⲡⲛⲟⲩⲧⲉ ⲧνηστείαⲛⲏⲥⲧⲓⲁⲛⲏⲥⲧⲓⲁ
ϣⲱⲡⲉ ϫⲉ ⲕⲛⲁⲃⲱⲕ ⲙⲙⲡϣⲟⲣⲡ ⲛ
ϩⲟⲟⲩ ⲉⲡⲧⲟⲟⲩ ⲛϩⲱ ⲉϣⲟ
ⲡⲉ ⲕⲛⲏⲩⲛϩⲱⲟ
ⲡⲉⲕⲛⲏⲩ︥ ⲁⲛ ⲙⲡⲁⲧⲉⲧⲉνηστείαⲛⲏⲥ
ⲧⲓⲁⲙⲡⲁⲧⲉⲛⲏⲥ
ⲧⲓⲁ ϣⲱⲡⲉ ⲙⲡⲣⲉ
ϭⲛⲧⲁⲛⲉϭⲛⲧⲁⲛⲉ
ⲃ
